command_adapter_input.reason: Design Delta now tracks checked command adapter input lanes through the consumer-rendering census and compatibility-bridge metadata instead of keeping duplicate value-flow rows.

loop_state_field.reason: Design Delta retired the checked run_state_path loop-state carrier; remaining resume evidence is tracked through retirement reports instead of live checked loop-state rows.

pointer_path.reason: Design Delta no longer keeps checked pointer-path rows in the value-flow census; remaining pointer lanes are tracked through bridge metadata and emitted reports.
